metadata.description: CANN 950 算子全流程工具：仓扫描(scann-repo) + 算子跑测(ops-test) + 失败上报(report-issues) + issue 跟踪与 FAQ(track-issues)

plugins.name: cann-ops
plugins.description: CANN 950 operator full-cycle toolset: scan repos for 950-dependent operators (hif8/simt/RegBase/CV-fusion), then run Phase 1-4 tests with inter-repo concurrency and generate structured reports.
